---
title: "Riluzole subset analysis"
format: html
---



```{r}
#Riluzole subset analysis

cat("Riluzole subset size:", nrow(df_riluzole), "\n")
cat("Events per phenotype:\n")
table(df_riluzole$Cyrius_phenotype, df_riluzole$event, useNA = "always")
```


```{r}
# PLOT 4: Kaplan-Meier curves by riluzole use

km_riluzole <- survfit(Surv(survival_years, event) ~ Cyrius_phenotype,
                       data = df_riluzole)

png("km_curve_riluzole.png", width = 1200, height = 800, res = 150)

plot(km_riluzole,
     col       = c("#2c3e50", "#2980b9", "#e74c3c", "#27ae60"),
     lty       = 1,
     lwd       = 2,
     xlab      = "Time (years)",
     ylab      = "Survival probability",
     main      = "Kaplan-Meier survival curves by CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype\nTurkey cohort — confirmed riluzole users",
     mark.time = TRUE,
     xlim      = c(0, 15),
     ylim      = c(0, 1))

legend("bottomleft",
       legend = c("NM - 75", "IM - 37", "PM - 2", "UM - 9"),
       col    = c("#2c3e50", "#2980b9", "#e74c3c", "#27ae60"),
       lty    = 1,
       lwd    = 2,
       title  = "Metaboliser phenotype (n)",
       bty    = "n")

dev.off()

```
